a=assert;local V=type;local y=function(k)local H,J,j,M=0,0,#k,0xFFFFFFFF;local w=function()H=H+1;return D(k,H,H);end;for D=1,5 do J=J*256+w();end;local function D(k)local T=0;for i=k,1,-1.0 do
